title: Frcctre 2 Pack Vintage Glass Bottles with Cork, 24 Oz Decorative Glass Bottles, Large Wine Oil Vineger Bottles, Decorative Glass Vases Apothecary Glass Bottles Flower Glass Bud Vases
description:
About this item
Embossed Glass Bottles: Includes 2 pcs of glass bottles with cork. The dimension of each bottle: 11.75"H X3"W, Capacity:24oz. Each glass bottle in this decorative bottles set is similar to a typical wine bottle size,The size gives the bottles character and makes it a real eye-catcher
High Quality Material: Our empty liquor bottles are made of high-quality glass that is not easy to have chemical interaction with the seasoning, or produce other substances that is harmful to health. They are BPA free and Lead free. The superior glass allows heavy resistance to ensure the long term use
Elegant Bottles: Glass oil bottle with cork make it easy to store oil, vinegar and other kitchen liquids. The transparent design of the bottles lets you can easily see the contents, and quickly get what your want. Ideal for safely store your olive oil and vinegar and other liquids
Muti-functional Bottles: These vintage glass bottles can not only use for anything kitchen uses, but also can be used as bud vases, wedding favors, medicine jars, liquor bottles and more. The bottle is also great for art or DIY projects such as sand art, bottle messages, or many others
Ideal Gifts: The high-quality glass is shaped to mimic the look of classic antique bottles. These decorative glass bottles make a great addition to your spice cabinet, bar, or as decoration around the house. Perfect as a house-warming present for who love to decorate their home. Perfect for living room, bedroom, office or suncatchers, bottle trees and etc
› See more product details
reviews_5s: These bottles are perfect for my coffee bar. They are easy to use, and are so pretty to display. They could be used for so many things, but I use them for my coffee syrups. They are sturdy and will not break easily.So nic to have my oils available for cooking. Looks awesome on the counterI got these to make a special wedding gift for a friend, and they do not disappoint. I'm unsure about the purpose of the hooks in the cork as they pop out with no real resistance, but the corks and bottles look gorgeous and are functional. They feel a little fragile, but should be perfect for what I'm using them for.BeautifulLove these bottles, perfect for juices, and sexy design.These glass bottles are very pretty, high quality and easily considered decorative. They are a bit oddly sized but it doesn't matter to me, I just wish they fit better in the cabinet/dishwasher. I make my own mead and these will be used as gift bottles but they could easily be fitted with a pour top and used for olive oil and displayed on the counter. I also considered using them for decorative purposes with dried grasses and wild flowers. They are very versatile.These decorative bottles are beautiful! Love the fancy designs on them. They are great to make a creative gift!Je les ai utilisées pour faire des cadeaux en y mettant des minis lumières. SUPER
